# Copilot Instructions for Planetariam Museum

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - User wants a web-based virtual museum inspired by a planetarium, using Three.js, with character movement and interactive info points.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Project structure will be created in the 'Planetariam Museum' folder.

- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Execution Guidelines
- Use '.' as the working directory.
- Avoid verbose explanations.
- Use placeholders for media assets.
- Only install extensions specified by project setup info.
- Keep communication concise.
